commands.review_summary:
The PR attempts to clear gateway service marker env vars from the startup auto-update child command and expands the update-startup test expectation.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +6. Total +8 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-backed: the service environment sets the markers, the startup updater spawns through `runCommandWithTimeout`, and the update guard blocks when those markers remain. I did not run a live launchd/npm auto-update path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor needs to correct the env-removal implementation and add real behavior proof before merge; ClawSweeper repair should not replace missing external proof on this PR.

target.title: fix(update): strip service markers for auto updates
target.body:
Fixes #78492.

## Summary
- clears inherited `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER` / `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND` for auto-update child commands
- preserves `OPENCLAW_AUTO_UPDATE=1` so the update command still knows it is an auto-update run
- extends the startup update test to cover the service-marker inheritance case

## Test plan
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/infra/update-startup.test.ts` (13 tests)

Note: commit hook was skipped after the targeted test because this isolated worktree uses a temporary `node_modules` symlink; the hook attempted an interactive pnpm install and aborted before commit.
target.author: alix-007
